articles.title: ICC hands Nawaz three-month ban for breaching anti-doping code
articles.description: "Nawaz's records from the match against the Netherlands on 7 February and in subsequent matches until 1 May 2026 have been disqualified," an ICC release said

articles.title: 'Incredibly disappointing' - Associates criticise ICC's revamped ODI World Cup format
articles.description: They argue that the newly introduced Super Series limits opportunities they have to compete and grow on the global stage

articles.title: Short's 121* not enough as Washington Freedom make third straight MLC final
articles.description: San Francisco Unicorns came close to overcoming the stiff 239 target but fell short

articles.title: Ronchi to coach Renegades in the BBL, White moves to Stars
articles.description: White switches roles from Renegades to Stars while Ronchi leaves New Zealand to take a second senior franchise role and his first in the BBL

articles.title: Lennox stars again as New Zealand take series lead after West Indies collapse
articles.description: The left-arm spinner picked up another four wickets as the hosts crumbled to 140 all out, losing six wickets for 19

articles.title: Root's classy 99 not out helps England level the series
articles.description: Kohli and Iyer hit half-centuries for India but their total of 233 was not enough

articles.title: Mithali Raj: Mandhana should have been made India captain 'two-three years back'
articles.description: Raj says India need a clearer succession plan keeping in mind Harmanpreet's fitness

articles.title: Joe Root happy to sacrifice ton for victory
articles.description: Batter tells Gus Atkinson not to worry about leaving him on 99 not out as England level ODI series with India

articles.title: Harmer, Markram and Wolvaardt win top honours at CSA awards
articles.description: De Kock and Ngidi also went home with multiple awards, while Breetzke's breakthrough campaign earned him the Men's ODI International Player of the Year award

articles.title: New Zealand bowl; West Indies bring in Shimron Hetmyer after long layoff
articles.description: Keemo Paul was another familiar face making a return to the XI

articles.title: "Fluidity was not there" — Varun Aaron on Rohit Sharma's scratchy knock against England
articles.description: Rohit Sharma dismissed for 26 off 47 balls as India draw level with England in second ODI.

articles.title: Top 3 knocks of Rohit Sharma since 2025 in ODIs
articles.description: Since 2025, Rohit has scored 891 runs in 22 innings, averaging 42.42 and striking at 96.95 with two centuries.

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: Ravi Shastri pays homage to Rohit Sharma after news of his retirement breaks out
articles.description: Rohit has had a decorated ODI career, scoring 11,757 runs in 287 matches, averaging 48.58 and striking at 92.76. He has scored 33 centuries, of which a record three are double centuries.

articles.title: ‘Leadership is developed on the field, not on the shelf’ - Mithali Raj backs Shafali Verma for India's T20 captaincy
articles.description: Former India captain backs Smriti Mandhana for ODI leadership while defending Shafali Verma's case for T20Is.

articles.title: Sri Lanka name 15-member squad for Pakistan ODI series with Chamari Athapaththu leading
articles.description: Squad retains strength after T20 World Cup campaign as three-match ODI series begins Thursday, July 23.

articles.title: 'People would taunt me & my family' - Kranti Gaud reflects on inspiring journey from Bundelkhand to Lord's honours board
articles.description: The 22-year-old scripted history by claiming a five-wicket haul in the first innings of the first-ever women's Test at Lord's.

articles.title: Pakistan's Mohammad Nawaz sanctioned for breaching ICC's Anti-Doping Code
articles.description: According to the governing body, the 32-year-old tested positive following the consumption of a 'Substance of Abuse', that being Carboxy-THC.

articles.title: Joe Root is to England what Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma are to India, says Anil Kumble
articles.description: Former India captain Anil Kumble compares England's mainstay to India's two premier batters.

articles.title: Rajasthan Royals felt ready to move on without me, says Sanju Samson
